scientific_scope: Prospective learned-control study in the disclosed two-product Program O researcher extension. The historical STOP_PROGRAM_O_AFTER_CORRECTIVE_VALIDATION remains unchanged.

genealogy.confirmed_result: Classical observable feedback has a positive canonical-ReT advantage in three connected cells with 27/27 information placebos, equal scheduled resources and direct state dependence.
genealogy.unconfirmed_result: Simultaneous CVaR10 non-inferiority was not established in two cells.
genealogy.new_endpoint_decision: Canonical ReT is the sole promotion endpoint for Program O-R. CVaR10 is secondary and cannot promote or block.

observation.fixed_model_rule: The belief model is fixed across all cells; true sensitivity-cell rho/share is forbidden.

learner.rollout_rounding_disclosure: RecurrentPPO completes 391 rollouts of n_steps=512; changing n_steps after this smoke is forbidden.
learner.reward: zero for decisions 1-7; terminal ret_excel_request_snapshot_v2 only

tape_custody.training_partition: 25,024 stepped training tapes plus one reset-only sentinel per learner seed; 250,250 opened skeletons total

comparators.open_loop: complete 65,536-calendar frontier; maximum mean, never per-tape post-hoc maximum
comparators.classical: maximum mean over all ten frozen state-rich configurations
comparators.bootstrap_reselection: reselect family maximum mean inside each bootstrap resample

risk_sensitivity.principle: Garrido-style mechanism masks: activate only risks touching the product-mix line or the demand it serves.

directly_relevant_risks.R21: Op5/Op6/Op7 and Op9 simultaneous capacity loss

risk_sensitivity.sequence: Evaluate the frozen risk-off learner first. Run frozen-policy OOD sensitivity second. Fine-tuning requires a later preregistration and cannot alter the primary verdict.

domain_boundary: Internal result is a disclosed researcher extension until Garrido confirms nonfungible ration classes sharing Op5-Op7 capacity and the ReT timestamp semantics.

evaluator_amendment_v1_1_2026_07_17.frozen_before: calibration seed 7480001 (no 7480xxx seed opened at amendment time)
closes_audited_defects: modal/phase_only/frequency_matched comparators (comparators/named) are EXECUTED per learner seed per cell via the saved 65,536-calendar panel and GATED at >=8/10 seeds beating each family

scheduled_resource_equality_exact verified: max spread across learner+classical policies per tape over gross_policy_batch_slots/gross_production_quantity/charged_daily_dispatch_slots/charged_downstream_vehicle_hours must be exactly 0.0

phase=confirmation REFUSES to run without --calibration-result (provisional_primary_pass=True AND all amendment_gates True) plus --authorization signed by the independent auditor with matching contract and calibration-result SHA-256
evaluator_amendment_v1_1_2026_07_17.fail_closed: absent, empty, or unexecuted components FAIL the gate (anti-022abd0); pinned by tests/test_program_o_ret_learner_evaluator_amendment.py (13 tests)

evaluator_amendment_v1_2_2026_07_17.frozen_before: calibration seed 7480001 (verified unopened at freeze time)
closes_independent_audit_partial_fail: F5: phase=confirmation additionally REQUIRES --full-des-audit artifact with passed=True covering the calibration run
demand preservation GATED: visible_rows+omitted_rows==generated_orders exact (frontier+learners+classical) and aggregate_ration/raw_material residuals <= 1e-6
resource equality scope extended to the FULL 65,536-calendar frontier (per-tape frontier spread AND learner/classical cross-diff vs frontier anchor must be exactly 0.0)
evaluation custody: SHA-256 manifest over every written raw matrix (raw_matrix_manifest.sha256.json) with its digest embedded in result.json
